user.title: Connect to ETA Hack
user.description: Enter the address of your ETAtouch device.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the ETA device. Check the host, port, and that LAN access is enabled on the device.

abort.already_configured: This ETA device is already configured.

init.title: ETA Hack controls
init.description: Define writable controls for your device. This is required on API < 1.2, which cannot auto-detect writable variables. Choose an action, then select Save to apply.

add_switch.title: Add switch — choose variable
add_switch.description: Pick the variable from the menu tree, or type its URI (Node/Fub/Fkt/Io/Var).

add_switch_values.title: Add switch — raw values
add_switch_values.description: Current value: {current} (raw {raw}). Confirm the raw values the device expects for Off and On.

add_number.title: Add number — choose variable
add_number.description: Pick the variable from the menu tree, or type its URI (Node/Fub/Fkt/Io/Var).

add_number_values.title: Add number — range
add_number_values.description: Current value: {current} {unit} (scale factor {scale}). Set the allowed range and step (in display units).

add_select.title: Add select
add_select.description:
Pick the variable, then list the choices, one per line as Label=rawvalue. Example:
Comfort=1802
Eco=1803

error.invalid_options: Enter at least one valid choice in the form Label=rawvalue.
